mergeCommitCI.scope: Merge-commit evidence for main push and accepted-tag push; not inherited by the closeout commit

closeoutCommitCI.scope: This commit cannot self-reference its future SHA or CI. Git and GitHub are authoritative after push; the controller must wait for and verify CI attached to the exact emitted closeout SHA.

lastAction: Merged and accepted Slice 2B16 through PR #18, archived both exact GitHub final-review comments, and prepared the single docs-only post-merge closeout. Cerenovus remains PARTIAL.
nextAction: Push the one docs-only closeout commit, then wait for and verify CI for its exact Git/GitHub SHA. Do not start Slice 2B17.
